description: Conservative preservation pack for Skia4Delphi controls. Skia4Delphi supports VCL and FMX, so existing Skia controls are usually preserved when the target project owns and references the correct Skia packages.

rules.notes: Skia label exists in the Skia4Delphi control family for VCL and FMX. Preserve the class when the target project enables Skia and references FMX.Skia/System.Skia as needed.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify Skia package installation, unit references, font behavior, text layout, and target-platform support.

rules.notes: Animated image support is cross-framework, but external animation/image assets must be deployed with the FMX application.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify asset paths, deployment entries, playback options, and platform codecs.

rules.notes: Paint-box logic may be portable when drawing code uses Skia APIs rather than VCL canvas APIs.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review OnDraw code for framework-specific coordinates, colors, bitmap types, and event signatures.

rules.notes: Animated paint box may be portable when animation/drawing code is Skia-based.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review animation timing, repaint logic, and Skia drawing callbacks.

rules.notes: SVG display can usually be preserved with Skia4Delphi installed in the FMX target.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify SVG source paths, wrap/scaling behavior, and resource deployment.

rules.notes: SVG brush support may be portable within Skia4Delphi-enabled targets.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify brush ownership, source resources, and FMX styling interaction.
